prompt: Create a square-crop profile-picture style cinematic portrait of a bald adult man viewed from the front, tightly framed from the top of the head to the upper chest. The subject has visible ears on both sides, a strong neck, and wears a black leather jacket with a short stand collar and a small front zipper. Cover the entire face with exactly 1 large centered opaque square censor block, aligned vertically and horizontally over the head, extending from just below the top of the skull down past the mouth/chin area; the block should be a muted dark plum-to-purple gradient with no text or symbols. Use dramatic neon studio lighting: warm amber/orange rim light on the left side of the head and neck, bright magenta/pink rim light on the right side, with a dark indigo-purple background and soft depth-of-field blur. The visible skin should have realistic texture and high-detail pores, while the overall look is photorealistic, moody, futuristic, and suitable as a mysterious social media avatar. Use muted dark plum purple gradient, black leather, warm amber orange, magenta pink, and dark indigo purple.
